description: AI-manageable audio CDN: upload, transcode, normalize, stream & deliver audio, plus grounded docs.
name: net.audiodelivery/mcp

environmentVariables.description: AudioDN server-side API key (adn_...). Required for live API tools; knowledge/doc tools work without it.
environmentVariables.name: ADN_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Override the AudioDN API base URL. Defaults to https://api.audiodelivery.net.
environmentVariables.name: ADN_API_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to enable destructive delete tools. Off by default.
environmentVariables.name: ADN_MCP_ALLOW_DELETE

title: Audio Delivery Network
